titles.title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 185) to advance responsible policies.
Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 185) to advance responsible policies.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Rules.
Motion to Discharge Committee filed by Mr. Gottheimer. Petition No: 119-13.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of the bill (H.R. 185) to advance responsible policies.
